task: Implement map.js exposing mount(), magnitudeColor(), magnitudeRadius() against vendored Leaflet.
verification_notes: S2.A1: L.map() + L.tileLayer with OSM creates a visible interactive world map; pan/zoom enabled by default.
S2.A2: one L.circleMarker per event with finite lat/lon; markerCount returned.
S2.A3: magnitudeRadius is monotonic non-decreasing (3 -> 22 clamp); strictly increasing on the open interval (0, ~12).
S2.A4: magnitudeColor returns 5 distinct values across magnitude buckets — exceeds the >=3 requirement.
S2.A5: bindPopup with HTML containing place, magnitude, depth, and human-readable time.
TDIP1.A2: L.map / L.tileLayer / L.circleMarker all called.
TDIP3.A1/A2: monotonic radius and >=3 distinct color buckets confirmed.
